title: Agent Orange (disambiguation) - Wikipedia
body: Look up Agent Orange in Wiktionary, the free dictionary. Agent Orange is an herbicide and defoliant used by military forces. Agent Orange may also refer to: Music [ edit ] Agent Orange (album) , an album by Sodom Agent Orange (band) , a punk rock band from Orange County, California "Agent Orange", a song by Ski Patrol "Agent Orange", a song by Tori Amos from Boys for Pele "Agent Orange", a song by Depeche Mode from the single "Strangelove" "Agent Orange", a song by Cage Kennylz "Agent Orange", a song by Heaven Shall Burn from Wanderer "Agent Orange", a song by Limewax "Agent Orange", a song by Pharoahe Monch "Agent Orange", a song by Slapshock Fictional characters [ edit ] Agent Orange (Wildstorm) , of the Wildcats in the Wildstorm Universe Larfleeze or Agent Orange, a DC Comics supervillain Agent Orange, a Batman family enemy Agent Orange (comics) , several comics characters Other uses [ edit ] Agent Orange (film) , a 2004 silent film Agent Orange (video game) , a 1987 shoot 'em up game for the Commodore 64 See also [ edit ] Donald Trump in popular culture Topics referred to by the same term This disambiguation page lists articles associated with the title Agent Orange . If an internal link incorrectly led you here, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended article.
